title: Vendor cleanup
body:
Some cleanups for the dependencies. I pinned branches to commits or releases (where possible) and added a `make vendor` target. We might consider integrating `make vendor` into Travis to make sure the vendor.conf is in sync with `./vendor`.

Cc @TomSweeneyRedHat @nalind @rhatdan

comments.body:
@vrothberg as you've looked through the code and didn't find those removed ones in use, then:
LGTM assuming happy tests
@TomSweeneyRedHat do you know if the Red Hat CI has some hiccups atm?
IDK at the moment, but it's been a 50/50 success rate lately.  I'd restart it after Travis finishes.
:-D well Travis seemed to have changed sides
Ah, gingko needs to come back. I'll whitelist it in make vendor.

:pushpin: Commit a5d5332 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan a5d53325bfd32fbd18c06f0352c059d062b36bb2 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
